pages.text: $(l:creatures/shade_of_leonard)Leonard$(/l)'s Urns are magical artifacts that are rumored to allow the properties of a $(l:brews/brewing#brew_definition)Brew$(/l) that they filled with to be repeatedly cast using $(l:artifacts/tools/mystic_branch)Mystic Branch$(/l).$(br)Tales have even been told, that urns can be combined together to allow up to four Brews to be added at a time. It seems that only a single Urn can be used at a time though.
